title: Composed nightly. Sourced within ninety miles. Served with intent.
subtitle: A glimpse of dishes currently on the chef's tasting menu. The full pairing is presented at the table.

categories.label: All
categories.description: Every dish currently on the pass.

items.name: Heirloom Tomato Confit
items.description: Hand-pulled burrata, basil oil, sourdough crisp, aged balsamic pearls.

items.name: Hokkaido Scallop Crudo
items.description: Yuzu kosho, finger lime, cucumber granita, micro shiso.

items.name: Saffron Risotto Milanese
items.description: Carnaroli rice, Vialone Nano stock, aged Parmigiano, gold leaf finish.

items.name: Hearth-Roasted Duck Breast
items.description: Sour cherry gastrique, charred endive, smoked potato purée.

items.name: Wagyu A5 with Bone Marrow
items.description: Binchotan-grilled tenderloin, brown butter, fermented black garlic.

items.name: Wild Sea Bass en Papillote
items.description: Local fennel, preserved lemon, vermouth nage, dill oil.

items.name: Dark Chocolate Cremeux
items.description: Single-origin 72%, olive oil, fleur de sel, raspberry sorbet.

items.name: Crème Brûlée à la Lavande
items.description: Lavender-infused Madagascar vanilla, candied violets, shortbread.

items.name: Reserve Pinot Noir Flight
items.description: Three half-pours from Sonoma, Willamette and Burgundy. Served at the bar.

items.name: House Botanical Aperitif
items.description: Cold-pressed grapefruit, juniper tonic, smoked rosemary garnish.
